actions.expression:
SELECT chypgl.sid,
       chypgl.rkrq,
       chypgl.cpbh,
       chypgl.lxm,
       chypgl.zwpm
FROM chypgl 
WHERE (chypgl.lxm=[出货样管理.条 形 码]) 
ORDER BY chypgl.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT cymxsheet.sid,
       cymxsheet.cpbh,
       cymxsheet.zwpm,
       cymxsheet.ywpm,
       cymxsheet.cpgg,
       cymxsheet.jldw,
       cymxsheet.yjfl,
       cymxsheet.ejfl,
       cymxsheet.sjfl,
       cymxsheet.bzdw,
       cymxsheet.wxrl,
       cymxsheet.wxtj,
       cymxsheet.ywbz,
       cymxsheet.hgjldw,
       cymxsheet.gcjg,
       cymxsheet.zhwbgpm,
       cymxsheet.hgbm,
       cymxsheet.tsl,
       cymxsheet.gcmc,
       cymxsheet.ywrya,
       cymxsheet.wxmz,
       cymxsheet.wxjz,
       cymxsheet.caiziz,
       cymxsheet.ysez,
       cymxsheet.gdry,
       cymxsheet.wxwyzd,
       cymxsheet.cght,
       cymxsheet.cpfl,
       cymxsheet.zsbh,
       cymxsheet.wxbm1,
       ywbdzb.dyywzm,
       cymxsheet.zycpbh
FROM cymx,cymxsheet 
LEFT 
JOIN ywbdzb 
  ON cymxsheet.wxbm1=ywbdzb.ywb 
WHERE (cymx.rid=cymxsheet.pid) 
  AND (cymx.chyrq>=[出货样管理.入库产品信息.出运日期]) 
ORDER BY cymxsheet.sid ASC

actions.expression:
select * from (select zscp.sid,zscp.yjfl,zscp.ejfl,zscp.sjfl,2 sort_id 
  from zscp where cpbh=[出货样管理.产品编号]
select cjcp.sid,cjcp.yjfl,cjcp.ejfl,cjcp.sjfl,1 sort_id from cjcp where cpbh=[出货样管理.产品编号]
SELECT cpfl.sid,cpfl.yjlb yjfl,cpfl.ejlb ejfl,cpfl.sjlb sjfl,0 sort_id
FROM cpfl 
WHERE (cpfl.wfgs=[出货样管理.公司名称]) 
  AND (cpfl.cpfl=[出货样管理.产品分类])) a where ifnull(yjfl,'')<>'' order by sort_id desc limit 1

actions.expression:
SELECT cpfl.sid,cpfl.yjlb,cpfl.ejlb,cpfl.sjlb 
FROM cpfl 
WHERE (cpfl.wfgs=[出货样管理.公司名称]) 
  AND (cpfl.cpfl=[出货样管理.产品分类]) 
  AND (cpfl.yjlb=[出货样管理.一级分类]) 
ORDER BY cpfl.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT cpfl.sid,cpfl.yjlb,cpfl.ejlb,cpfl.sjlb 
FROM cpfl 
WHERE (cpfl.wfgs=[出货样管理.公司名称]) 
  AND (cpfl.cpfl=[出货样管理.产品分类]) 
  AND (cpfl.yjlb=[出货样管理.一级分类]) 
  AND (cpfl.ejlb=[出货样管理.二级分类]) 
ORDER BY cpfl.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT zscp.sid,zscp.yytp,zscp.zwdw 
FROM zscp 
WHERE (zscp.cpbh=[出货样管理.入库产品信息.产品编号] and ifnull(zscp.cpbh,'')<>'') 
  OR ((zscp.krhh=[出货样管理.入库产品信息.产品编号]  and ifnull(zscp.cpbh,'')<>'')
  or (zscp.zsbh=[出货样管理.入库产品信息.专属编号]  and ifnull(zscp.cpbh,'')<>''))
ORDER BY zscp.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT chypglsheet1.sid,
       chypglsheet1.cyrq,
       chypglsheet1.cpbh,
       chypglsheet1.yytp,
       chypglsheet1.zwpm,
       chypglsheet1.ywpm,
       chypglsheet1.cpgg,
       chypglsheet1.cpfl,
       chypglsheet1.jldw,
       chypglsheet1.yjfl,
       chypglsheet1.ejfl,
       chypglsheet1.sjfl,
       chypglsheet1.bzdw,
       chypglsheet1.bzrl,
       chypglsheet1.bztj,
       chypglsheet1.zhwbzh,
       chypglsheet1.bzhfsh,
       chypglsheet1.zwdw,
       chypglsheet1.cgdj,
       chypglsheet1.bgpm,
       chypglsheet1.hgbm,
       chypglsheet1.tsl,
       chypglsheet1.zxcgl,
       chypglsheet1.sccj,
       chypglsheet1.cgry,
       chypglsheet1.cjID,
       chypglsheet1.rksl,
       chypglsheet1.mxmz,
       chypglsheet1.mxjz,
       chypglsheet1.chpchc,
       chypglsheet1.caizi,
       chypglsheet1.yse,
       chypglsheet1.ks,
       chypglsheet1.gdry,
       chypglsheet1.wyzd,
       chypglsheet1.lxm,
       chypglsheet1.cpbh1,
       chypglsheet1.wxwy,
       chypglsheet1.cght,
       chypglsheet1.zsbh
FROM chypglsheet1 
WHERE (chypglsheet1.cpbh=[出货样管理.产品编号]) 
  AND (chypglsheet1.lxm<>[出货样管理.条 形 码]) 
ORDER BY chypglsheet1.sid ASC

view.params:
SELECT zycpfenglb.cpfl
FROM zycpfenglb
group by zycpfenglb.cpfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.yjfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[出货样管理.产品分类]) group by zycpfenglb.yjfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.ejfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[出货样管理.产品分类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.yjfl=[出货样管理.一级分类])  group by zycpfenglb.ejfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.sjfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[出货样管理.产品分类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.yjfl=[出货样管理.一级分类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.ejfl=[出货样管理.二级分类]) group by zycpfenglb.sjfl

SELECT ywrybiao.wfgs
FROM ywrybiao group by ywrybiao.wfgs

SELECT zycpfenglb.cpfl
FROM zycpfenglb
group by zycpfenglb.cpfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.yjfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[出货样管理.产品分类]) group by zycpfenglb.yjfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.ejfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[出货样管理.产品分类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.yjfl=[出货样管理.一级分类])  group by zycpfenglb.ejfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.sjfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[出货样管理.产品分类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.yjfl=[出货样管理.一级分类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.ejfl=[出货样管理.二级分类]) group by zycpfenglb.sjfl

SELECT bzdw.dwdm,bzdw.SID
FROM bzdw
ORDER BY bzdw.SID ASC

SELECT bzhfsh.zhwbzh,bzhfsh.SID
FROM bzhfsh
ORDER BY bzhfsh.SID ASC

SELECT DISTINCT(cymxsheet.gcmc)
FROM cymxsheet
WHERE (cymxsheet.cpbh=[出货样管理.入库产品信息.产品编号])

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
ORDER BY ywrybiao.yhm ASC

SELECT jldw.dwdm,jldw.SID
FROM jldw
ORDER BY jldw.SID ASC

客人要样
采购推荐

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.zw like "%采购%")
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC
